prompt: A playful spooky Japanese title logo on a clean white background, centered composition, featuring the large hiragana text はるか in bold rounded hand-drawn lettering, white letters with icy pale-blue shading, subtle grunge texture, and a thick dark navy outline with luminous blue glow. Surround the text with a Halloween yokai atmosphere: 1 cute white ghost floating at the upper left of the lettering, 1 red-orange paper lantern hanging on the left side with black kanji printed on it, 1 large magnifying glass overlapping the lower right of the text, and 1 haunted castle silhouette in the background with 3 tall spires and warm glowing windows. Add 1 traditional Japanese stone lantern on the right with a lit window, 2 blue ghost-fire torches on the far right, several black bat silhouettes flying around the castle, deep indigo mist, electric blue flames, and an inky dripping shadow base beneath the logo. Use a vibrant neon palette of midnight blue, cyan glow, white, and orange accents, with a polished sticker-like game-logo illustration style, crisp edges, soft airbrushed lighting, whimsical horror mood, and high contrast.
